name: Ammonia Refrigeration Expansion & RMP Threshold Update
description: Open the 2024 Tier II submission for "Arctic Cold Storage & Logistics" located at C:\Users\Docker\Documents\arctic_cold_storage_2024.t2s in EPA Tier2 Submit 2025. Update the facility's regulatory status to indicate it is now "Subject to CAA Section 112(r)" (change from No to Yes). In the Identification Numbers section, add the RMP Facility ID: "1000 0012 3456" and the TRI Facility ID: "99501ARCTC123CO". Then navigate to the chemical inventory for Ammonia (anhydrous) (CAS 7664-41-7) and update the quantities: Maximum Daily Amount to 12500 lbs and Average Daily Amount to 11000 lbs. Finally, add a second storage location for Ammonia (do not delete the existing one): Storage Type: Tank inside building, Pressure: Greater than ambient pressure, Temperature: Less than ambient temperature, Location Description: Engine Room 2 Receiver. Save the updated submission file as C:\Users\Docker\Documents\arctic_cold_storage_2025_updated.t2s
